Required default: DNP/open no default-populated vehicle-CAN TX path with 0 ohm 0603 DNP link or normally-open solder bridge candidate
Verification method: Schematic BOM and production DNP review
Pass condition: JP_CAN1 or equivalent CAN1_TX_ROUTE item remains DNP/open and no default-populated TX item exists
Blocked action: Do not populate TX link without future ADR and explicit hardware action

Required default: Disable asserted while LB-100 is reset unpowered or absent using SN74LVC1G125-Q1-class gate and 47k disable pull candidate
Pass condition: CAN1_TX_DISABLE_CMD is a disable command not an enable command and defaults disabled
Blocked action: Do not reinterpret CAN1_TX_DISABLE_CMD as enable

Required default: Asserted when physical TX path is disabled from the U_CAN1 physical OE disable node through 1k series and 100k pull-up candidate
Pass condition: Status is sourced from physical disabled state and not firmware-only
Blocked action: Do not report enabled-safe when physical gate state is unknown

Required default: May be populated independently for listen-only RX
Pass condition: RX route does not require CAN1_TX_ROUTE population
Blocked action: Do not require TX population for listen-only RX

Required default: CAN1 TX denied and CAN2 expansion TX remains separate
Pass condition: CAN1 TX attempts are denied and hardware disable cannot be bypassed; CAN2 expansion TX remains separate
Blocked action: Do not bypass hardware disable in firmware

Required default: Future TX requires future ADR plus explicit hardware action
Pass condition: Configuration alone cannot enable vehicle-CAN TX
Blocked action: Do not enable vehicle-CAN TX through configuration only

Required default: Factory-owned Default DNP/open no default-populated vehicle-CAN TX path
Pass condition: Factory notes preserve DNP/open no default-populated TX path
Blocked action: Do not move DNP/open link to default-populated item
